topFindings.description: BLOCKADE ACTIVE — 4 PM ET. Trump scraps 20% shipping fee, but blockade proceeds. Targeted: Iran-only (ships to/from Iranian ports or carrying Iranian cargo). Strait 'open to ALL ship traffic except for Iran.' IRGC disabled 2 supertankers today.

US completed 3rd consecutive night of strikes — 5-hour mission targeting coastal defense, missile/drone sites, maritime capabilities. First-ever offensive sea drone operation against Iranian naval installation.
Schneider PowerChute Serial Shutdown (ICSA-26-190-02) — UPS management software for OT servers. WaterISAC confirms 7 ICS advisories on July 7.

alertsTriggered.title: BLOCKADE ACTIVE — Iran-only (not full Strait closure) — 20% fee scrapped — IRGC disabled 2 supertankers today
